top_categories.workout_context: 75 miles on mixed terrain burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
79ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Belgrade Gran Fondo's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
Belgrade Gran Fondo's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 75 miles.
At Belgrade Gran Fondo, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Belgrade Gran Fondo. Train it until it feels boring.
5,906ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Base fitness for Belgrade Gran Fondo. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
5,906ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 75 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Belgrade Gran Fondo, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.

race_overlay.heat: June in Belgrade, Serbia can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Belgrade Gran Fondo. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Belgrade Gran Fondo’s 75 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Belgrade Gran Fondo. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Belgrade Gran Fondo requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, TT Threshold, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 75 miles of mixed terrain in Belgrade, Serbia.
